proof: function[T0, T1](x0: Category[T0, T1], x1: T1, x2: T1) { opposite_compose[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0.compose(x2, x1) }[UnitType, UnitType](terminal_category, f, g)
function[T0, T1](x0: Category[T0, T1]) { Category.new[T0, T1](x0.src, x0.dst, x0.identity, x0.compose) = Option.some[Category[T0, T1]](x0) }[UnitType, UnitType](terminal_category)

function[T0, T1](x0: Category[T0, T1]) { Category.new[T0, T1](x0.src, x0.dst, x0.identity, x0.compose) = Option.some[Category[T0, T1]](x0) }[UnitType, UnitType](opposite_category[UnitType, UnitType](terminal_category))
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { Option.some[T0](x0) != Option.some[T0](x1) or x0 = x1 }[Category[UnitType, UnitType]](terminal_category, opposite_category[UnitType, UnitType](terminal_category))
